session_note: S84 — user-queued 2-priority batch ahead of backlog work: (P1) pooped-cruiser grab gate — while a player's spark is pooped and trailing, the cruiser must NOT be able to grab primitives until the spark catches up; (P2) RAINBOW FLYOVER event — on rainbow-click switches, a dumb-looking rainbow character with a crooked tooth arcs left-to-right across the screen yelling a stupid voice line ('gnyaaaahngniiinghyouuu') while the whole background pulses colorful/trippy bright lights for the switch duration. User directive: 'Make it happen! be creative technical and thorough! then push it so i can check it out today', then CHECK/ANALYZE + /handoff. Model: Fable 5 (user-sanctioned S82/S83 precedent).

Battle Ledger 8 rows: P1 gate ships (Grok alternatives overruled 2.0>1.75), P2 sync design CHANGED by A.0 probe (one-shot effects lose ~5/6 cross-wire at 10Hz sampling vs per-frame wipe) -> synced rainbowSwitchTick field (additive-optional, S82 poopedUntilTick precedent, no schema bump); Gemini stacking/mid-join specs adopted; shader+RNG-arc alternatives rejected. PRIME-AUDIT delta documented in PDR. PDR: .claude/plans-archive/2026-06-10_PDR_S84_pooped-grab_rainbow-flyover_IN-PROGRESS.md. priorities.label: S84 P1 — POOPED-CRUISER PICKUP GATE: while poop-debuffed, PICKUP_SPARK requires avatar arrival within POOP_PICKUP_ARRIVAL_RADIUS of the spark
priorities.objective: Pooped players' cursors must not grab free sparks at full mouse speed; the 7px/tick chasing avatar must physically arrive first. Silent reject + diagnostics counter; host-authoritative; zero wire change.
priorities.testing: reject-far / allow-near / allow-after-expiry / allow-not-pooped / counter increment; full vitest + tsc
priorities.check_method: S84 P1 (commit 3feb7ef): gate inserted in applyPickupSpark AFTER the remote reach check, BEFORE fsmPickup commit — isCruiserDebuffed(player, world.tick) && distSq(spark.pos, avatarPos) > POOP_PICKUP_ARRIVAL_RADIUS(36)^2 -> raceRejects++ + NEW rejectReasons.pickupPoopedTooFar++ + silent return (race-reject precedent S42/S48). Import-cycle check done: gameMode.ts imports world.ts TYPE-ONLY so sparkLifecycle->gameMode edge creates no runtime cycle. Gate is a pure function of synced fields (poopedUntilTick + avatarPos + spark.pos all ride NetSnapshot) so optimistic client dispatch and host-authoritative dispatch agree by construction (Grok desync challenge resolved). Boundary semantics: > comparison means distSq==R^2 counts as arrived; radius 36 > 2 chase steps (7px) prevents click-vs-dispatch oscillation. GATES: 5 new unit tests (reject-far w/ cursor ON spark proving avatar-keyed; allow-near 14.1px; exact-boundary 36px allowed; expired-debuff ungated; un-pooped far ungated = pre-S84 behavior) — suite 20/20; FULL vitest 1252/1252; tsc clean. Live-behavior verification deferred to the P2 combined preview smoke + CI e2e lane on 3feb7ef (logged, not dropped).

priorities.label: S84 P2 — RAINBOW FLYOVER EVENT: synced rainbowSwitchTick field drives crooked-tooth rainbow L->R arc + trippy background + TTS dumb-voice yell on all peers
priorities.objective: On rainbow color-switch: flyover character (Imagen4+matte) arcs left-to-right over RAINBOW_FLYOVER_DURATION_TICKS=240 yelling a pitch-warped TTS nonsense line, background pulses trippy hue-cycled light (alpha<=0.30, no strobe). Reliable on both peers via additive-optional synced field.
priorities.scope: worldTypes/world.ts, rainbowLifecycle.ts, save.ts, audioManager.ts, rainbowFlyoverRenderer.ts (new), main.ts, constants.ts, public assets (PNG+OGG), tests + e2e extension
priorities.testing: switchTick set/restart; snapshot round-trip + back-compat; audio single-fire freshness; flyoverPose determinism; full vitest + tsc + bundle charter; live preview; post-push CI + live URL probes
priorities.check_method: S84 P2 (commit d20c325): SYNC — world.rainbowSwitchTick stamped in applyTriggerRainbow (overwrite=restart, Gemini row 8), serialized additive-optional ONLY-when-set (JSON.stringify drops undefined; explicit test asserts the key is ABSENT from the wire string = byte-identical pre-S84), plain-assign rehydrate clears stale local values, cleared at START_GAME + RETURN_TO_TITLE with the hazard teardown. AUDIO — syncRainbowYellAudio field-keyed latch (NOT the lossy effects channel, A.0 probe), 60-tick freshness window guards late joiners + mid-window restores; latch resets with the drain cursor in BOTH resetAudioDrainCursor and teardownAudio; same cross-solo-rematch same-tick exposure as lastDrainedTick (codebase-wide accepted semantics, noted). ASSETS — Imagen 4 character $0.04 matched the brief first roll (mismatched googly eyes, crooked teeth, stubby arms); make-rainbow-flyover-sprite.py matte (border-connected achromatic key, 2px feather, nearest-white unmix, RGB-zeroed transparents) probes green: ring 100% transparent, 81.2% transparent, 48 enclosed-white features intact, dark-composite inspected in-chat clean; Chirp3-HD Puck TTS $0.001 -> ffmpeg asetrate*1.30+vibrato(6Hz)+loudnorm -> 2.68s 19KB opus ogg. RENDERER — pure flyoverPose() (window boundaries incl. NaN/negative-elapsed rewind guard, offscreen-both-ends, apex midpoint, alpha<=0.30 photosensitivity sweep over ALL 240 ticks, determinism) + hsl01ToRgb anchors; backdrop stage index 0 w/ 8px shake overscan, wash+4 beams aboveFog, sticky procedural fallback. GATES: vitest 1269/1269 (+17); tsc clean (caught missing playerId in my own test actions — fixed); bundle 561.65kB=548.5KiB<550 charter (session delta +3.6KiB vs 2.5 PDR estimate — overshoot logged, in-charter); rainbow.spec e2e extended w/ open+self-close polls PASS 10.7s real browser; LIVE preview on session port 28125: apex screenshot posted in-chat (sprite texture served from public path, backdrop full-canvas bounds 1936x1096, char container at 990,216 = exact apex), zero console errors/warns; brightness bump (L .6->.66/.7/.8, peak alpha .28->.30) re-verified visually after HMR.

priorities.label: S84 P3 — GAME +20% LONGER: PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE 150->210, SCORE_TIER_STEP 50->70, co-tuned with P4 income change
priorities.objective: Match duration +20% vs current live feel. Math: P4 adds ~+15% typical income (0.25/functional capped) so WIN 210/150=1.40 / 1.15 = +21.7% duration. Hunter auto-scales (75% -> 157). All playtest knobs with documented version history.
priorities.testing: tier-scaling unit checks; e2e immune via __TEST_WIN_SCORE__ seam; full vitest + tsc

priorities.label: S84 P4 — SCORING: per-player HUD scoreboard + functional-bond complexity weight (capped) + WIN diag dump + distributed-pipeline regression tests (field report: non-builder won FFA)
priorities.objective: Field report S84: non-builder won a 4p FFA; builders' points 'seemed similar'. In-vitro probes prove core attribution + win-pick CORRECT; the two REAL verified defects: (a) one anonymous leader bar = total scoring illegibility (everyone watches the SAME bar), (b) functional bonds weigh ZERO so connected trees earn = scattered blobs (flattens builder differences). Fix: per-seat scoreboard (P{n} + floored score, seat colors, leader marker, local underline — CVD-safe via text), complexity += 0.25 x min(funcBonds, floor(1.5 x prims)) (connect-positive, clique-spam capped), WIN-time per-seat {score, complexity} console dump (field forensics), distributed-pipeline regression test (host snapshot -> ClientSync mirror -> WIN -> every peer attributes the builder).
priorities.scope: src/constants.ts, src/state/scoring.ts, src/state/gameState.ts, src/render/ui.ts, src/state/scoring.test.ts (new), e2e risk-check on smoke HUD probes
priorities.testing: formula weights + cap; 3p attribution; non-builder-never-outscores invariant; win attribution; distributed pipeline host->mirror; full vitest + tsc + bundle + gating e2e lane

Gemini REVISE -> adopted: CVD-safe text identity, leader marker, bond-formation juice + in-world crown logged as creative carry-forwards. Non-builder-win mechanism: NOT reproduced in vitro after 6 probes (attribution, win-pick, ENDGAME, reconnect guard, rainbow shuffle, score resets) — Grok correctly flags the live-vs-vitro contradiction as UNRESOLVED; instrumented carry-forward, NOT blind-patched.

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #recon-agents-map-the-wrong-verb #users-speak-in-avatars-not-actions: the recon agent read 'grab the primitives' as PLACE (the action that consumes a carried spark) because placement is where the existing validation blocks live — but the user's sentence structure ('until spark doesnt get to them he shouldnt be able to grab THEM') named the TARGET of the grab, and free sparks are what you grab. Reading applyPickupSpark directly settled it in one file: the only reach check was remote-only and cursor-keyed, so the debuff provably never bit for collecting. LESSON: when a user phrase maps to two candidate actions, diff the CANDIDATE VALIDATION PATHS — the bug lives where the check is MISSING, not where checks already exist. Second: the gate had to key on synced-field purity (poopedUntilTick/avatarPos/spark.pos) so optimistic and authoritative dispatch agree by construction — same construction S82 used for the cursor-target write.

P2 #probe-the-channel-before-riding-it #a-wrong-reviewer-claim-can-point-at-a-real-gap: Grok's HIGH finding ('the latch violates the effectsRenderer contract') was factually backwards — the drain-into-internal-state latch IS the established idiom — but auditing it empirically exposed the REAL adjacent flaw neither reviewer articulated: buildNetSnapshot samples world.effects live at the 10Hz emit while effectsRenderer wipes the array at 60Hz, so a rare one-shot effect reaches the client ~1/6 of the time (frequent effects mask this statistically; a once-per-match celebration would have been silently absent for the joiner most games). The synced-field design (additive-optional, overwrite=restart, freshness-windowed audio) was strictly better than ALL R1 positions. LESSON: when a reviewer's mechanism claim dies under triage, autopsy the NEIGHBORHOOD the claim pointed at before discarding it — S83's lesson was 'a FAIL verdict is a list of claims'; S84's refinement is 'a refuted claim still marks a map location worth probing'. Also: Imagen 4 nailed a comedic character brief in ONE $0.04 roll when the prompt specified the COMEDY MECHANICS (mismatched googly eyes, exactly one crooked buck tooth, stubby arms thrown up) rather than 'make it funny'.
